indicators.name: Black and white color scheme
indicators.rationale: The monochromatic color scheme may make it difficult to focus on the body's alignment during yoga.

indicators.name: Minimalist layout
indicators.rationale: The minimalist layout provides ample space for movement and allows for a clear view of the surroundings.

indicators.name: Hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring can be slippery and uncomfortable for yoga practice, especially without proper footwear.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for yoga/stretching due to the monochromatic color scheme and hard flooring, but the minimalist layout provides ample space for movement.
